message:
fix: add YAML escaping and prevent panic on empty gitignore entry

- Add escapeYAMLSingleQuote and escapeYAMLDoubleQuote helpers for
  proper YAML string escaping in generatePolicyYAML
- Fix ensureGitignoreEntry to handle empty entry without panic
- Use strings.TrimSuffix for safer trailing slash comparison
